sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79488" key="pare/skeqon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρέσκεθον</orth>, <sense id="n79488.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παρέχω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεσκευάδαται</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρερπ-άδατο</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παρασκευάζω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεστάμεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρερπ-άμεναι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παρίστημι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
